prompt: Create a grayscale depth map image featuring the zebra from image 1 positioned within a dense field of the colorful balls seen in image 2. The map should precisely illustrate depth variations of both the zebra's form and the multiple ball surfaces.
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map image depicting the zebra from image 1, centrally placed within a dense field of the colorful plastic balls from image 2. The depth map must precisely illustrate the three-dimensional form and depth variations of the zebra's body, alongside the distinct spherical shapes and varying depths of all the individual colorful balls.
objects: Three-dimensional form of the zebra's body (as depicted by depth)
Depth variations of the zebra's body (as depicted by depth)
Distinct spherical shapes of the plastic balls (as depicted by depth)
Varying depths of individual plastic balls (as depicted by depth)
